title: Phase 2 is live — TweetGenie now generates your entire week of content automatically
excerpt: The Monday morning flow in detail. How Gemini uses your strategy and trending topics to generate.
content:
## The Monday Morning Flow
Every Monday, you'll see a batch of tweets completely constructed based on your strategy and recent trending topics.

## The Review Queue
You can approve, edit or reject them right from your dashboard.

## Auto Scheduling
Once approved, it schedules at the recommended times for your specific audience activity.

[Start your first automated week free](/register)

seo.metaTitle: Phase 2 is Live: Weekly Content Generation
seo.metaDescription: TweetGenie now generates your entire week of content automatically.
